## Question

Write the field/user question exactly as it should appear.

## Proposed answer

Keep it short, public, and source-backed. Do not include persondata, patient details, private shelter locations, local phone lists, or sensitive operational details.

## Source IDs

List generated source IDs that support the answer.

## Taxonomy

- Roles:
- Scenarios:
- Competence codes:
- Equipment terms:

## Must-read?

- [ ] This should become a must-read notice
- [ ] This is normal FAQ/search content only

## Safety check

- [ ] Decision-support wording is clear
- [ ] No official command-system claim
- [ ] No backend sync/auth/live tracking requirement
- [ ] No sensitive private-location or personal data
